solutions.title: Unified Armed Forces Operational Situation Report Dashboard
solutions.description: Command-centre situational awareness dashboard for unified armed forces — tracking operational status, incidents, and field unit positions in real time.

solutions.title: Nigeria Navy Patrol Monitoring Dashboard
solutions.description: Live GIS-powered monitoring of naval patrol routes, vessel positions, and maritime zone coverage across Nigerian waters.

solutions.title: Border & Perimeter Surveillance
solutions.description: Sensor fusion with GIS for border monitoring — integrating UAV feeds, camera networks, and patrol tracking on a live map.

solutions.title: Incident Management System
solutions.description: Spatial incident logging, resource dispatch tracking, and after-action review tools for emergency response teams.

solutions.title: OAGF Capital Project Dashboard
solutions.description: Office of the Accountant-General of the Federation — spatial monitoring of capital project disbursements, progress, and performance across Nigeria.

solutions.title: National Commission for Refugees Dashboard
solutions.description: Geospatial dashboard for tracking refugee and IDP populations, camp locations, service delivery, and resettlement progress across Nigeria.

solutions.title: Electoral Boundary Mapping
solutions.description: Constituency demarcation, voter density analysis, polling station optimization and results visualization.

solutions.title: Engineering Project Monitoring & Evaluation Dashboard
solutions.description: End-to-end spatial tracking of engineering projects — monitoring milestones, contractor performance, and field progress across project sites.

solutions.title: Niger Delta Power Holding Company Asset Dashboard
solutions.description: Comprehensive asset registry and spatial dashboard for NDPHC — tracking generation assets, substations, and transmission infrastructure.

solutions.title: Routine Maintenance Dashboard – NDPHC
solutions.description: Planned and corrective maintenance tracking for NDPHC assets — scheduling, completion rates, and fault history mapped spatially.

solutions.title: Water Network Management
solutions.description: Pipe network mapping, pressure zone analysis, and maintenance scheduling for water utilities across service areas.

solutions.title: Biosecurity Planning & Monitoring Dashboard
solutions.description: National biosecurity risk mapping — tracking disease outbreak zones, livestock movement corridors, and intervention coverage across regions.

solutions.title: Agricultural Field Monitoring
solutions.description: Crop health analysis using satellite imagery, NDVI indices, and seasonal change detection for farm advisories.

solutions.title: Land Parcel Management System
solutions.description: Interactive cadastral mapping with parcel search, ownership history, and zoning overlays.

solutions.title: Land Information Management System (LIMS)
solutions.description: Comprehensive LIMS for tracking land transactions, ownership transfers, encumbrances and legal disputes.

solutions.title: Urban Growth Analysis
solutions.description: Multi-temporal land use change detection and urban sprawl modelling for city and regional planners.

solutions.title: Forest Cover Change Monitor
solutions.description: Deforestation tracking using Sentinel-2 and Landsat imagery with automated alert systems.

solutions.title: Coastal & Wetland Monitoring
solutions.description: Shoreline change analysis, mangrove health mapping, and flood risk modelling for coastal communities.
